element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns 48 national teams, chooses Exhibition/Tournament/Playoffs/League mode
Player learns to switch between 11 controlled footballers; computer handles rest
Core movement mechanic; isometric perspective requires spatial adjustment
Goal-oriented play; includes exploitable goalkeeper AI bug
Tackling and blocking opponents; learned through matches
Group stage (3 games) → Knockout stage (up to 4 games); escalating difficulty
Up to 4 human players compete; unpredictable play patterns vs CPU

typical_tension_triggers: Goalkeeper clearing ball into opponent possession
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based pacing; dynamic ball possession exchanges create micro-tension cycles; tournament structure provides macro tension arc with escalating difficulty in knockout rounds

spatial_grammar.note: Isometric viewpoint creates 2D diagonal play space; camera follows ball to keep it on-screen; pitch acts as primary navigation space

difficulty_curve.early_game: Exhibition matches and group stage games feature standard CPU difficulty; learning curve manageable
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Group stage completion introduces slightly stronger opponent tactics; advancement requires consistent play
difficulty_curve.late_game: Knockout tournament rounds feature maximum CPU difficulty; escalating stakes with elimination format
notable_spikes: First tournament knockout match (transition from group to single-elimination)
Multiplayer introduction (human unpredictability vs CPU patterns)

notable_level_patterns.description: Three mandatory matches in tournament mode; establishes baseline skill testing before high-stakes knockout play
Four potential single-elimination matches if team advances; each match represents increasing difficulty and opponent strength
Eight teams in double round-robin (14 matches total); extended engagement with varied opponents across multiple encounters
Diagonal camera angle creates unique spatial grammar; ball-tracking camera maintains focus on active play area; encourages omnidirectional positioning strategies
